Star Wars: One of the most iconic franchises in the galaxy, Star Wars™ has been captivating fans since 1977 - and our LEGO® Star Wars minifigures bring that galaxy far, far away right to your collection. From legendary Jedi like Luke Skywalker, Obi-Wan Kenobi, and Yoda to infamous Sith Lords like Darth Vader, Darth Maul, and Emperor Palpatine, every character tells a story. Build your army with clone troopers, stormtroopers, and rebel soldiers, or collect beloved droids like R2-D2™, C-3PO™, and BB-8. Our Star Wars minifigures span the Original Trilogy, Prequel Trilogy, Sequel Trilogy, and beyond - including characters from The Mandalorian™, Andor™, Ahsoka™, The Clone Wars™, and The Bad Batch™. Whether you're hunting for rare variants or building your ultimate Star Wars display, these minifigures capture every detail from the movies and shows that defined generations.
Harry Potter: Step into the magical world of Harry Potter™ with LEGO® minifigures that bring Hogwarts™ to life. Collect Harry, Ron, and Hermione throughout their years at school, from first-year students to battle-ready wizards. Build your collection with iconic professors like Dumbledore, McGonagall, and Snape, or add dark wizards like Voldemort and the Death Eaters. Our Harry Potter minifigures feature beloved characters from all eight films, including fan favorites like Dobby, Hagrid, Luna Lovegood, and Neville Longbottom. From Quidditch players in their house robes to Triwizard Tournament champions, each minifigure captures the magic and detail that makes the wizarding world so enchanting. Perfect for fans of all ages who want to recreate their favorite scenes or create new magical adventures.
Super Heroes: Assemble the ultimate superhero collection with LEGO® Marvel and DC Super Heroes minifigures! From the Avengers to the Justice League, collect legendary heroes like Spider-Man, Iron Man, Captain America, Batman, Superman, and Wonder Woman. Face off against notorious villains including Thanos, The Joker, Lex Luthor, and Green Goblin. Our Super Heroes collection spans the entire Marvel Cinematic Universe and DC Extended Universe, featuring characters from blockbuster movies, classic comic books, and hit TV shows. Whether you're building the Infinity War saga, creating epic Batman vs Superman battles, or assembling your own superhero team, these detailed minifigures bring the action and excitement of superhero adventures right to your fingertips.
NINJAGO: Master the art of Spinjitzu with LEGO® NINJAGO® minifigures! Join Kai, Jay, Cole, Zane, Lloyd, and Nya as they battle against the forces of evil threatening Ninjago City. From classic ninja training robes to advanced techno suits, collect dozens of variants for each ninja as they evolve through multiple seasons of adventures. Face legendary villains like Lord Garmadon, the Serpentine tribes, the Overlord, and the Skulkin army. Our NINJAGO collection includes minifigures from all seasons of the hit TV show, The LEGO NINJAGO Movie, and exclusive tournament fighters. With elemental powers, ancient weapons, and modern vehicles, these ninjas are ready for any battle. Perfect for fans who want to recreate epic showdowns or create their own Spinjitzu adventures.
Friends: Welcome to Heartlake City with LEGO® Friends minifigures! Follow the adventures of Andrea, Emma, Mia, Olivia, and Stephanie as they navigate friendship, creativity, and fun in their vibrant community. From beach days and camping trips to music performances and pet rescues, these mini-dolls capture every moment of friendship and adventure. Our Friends collection has evolved over the years, introducing new characters and celebrating diversity, ensuring every builder can see themselves in Heartlake City. Whether you're building the perfect treehouse, running a café, or caring for animals at the rescue center, LEGO Friends minifigures bring stories of kindness, creativity, and friendship to life.
City: Experience everyday adventures with LEGO® City minifigures! From brave firefighters and police officers to astronauts and construction workers, LEGO City captures the excitement of real-world jobs and adventures. Collect coast guard rescue teams, emergency responders, pizza delivery drivers, and everyone in between. Our City collection features minifigures representing diverse careers and lifestyles, from bustling downtown workers to mountain rescue teams and deep-sea explorers. With over four decades of iconic designs, LEGO City minifigures let builders of all ages create their own modern metropolis. Whether you're fighting fires, solving crimes, or exploring the Arctic, these minifigures bring the excitement of urban life and adventure to your collection.
Minecraft: Build, craft, and explore the blocky world of Minecraft® with LEGO® minifigures! From Steve and Alex to zombies, creepers, and endermen, bring your favorite Minecraft characters into the real world. Collect villagers, piglins, skeletons, and all the mobs that make Minecraft adventures unforgettable. Our Minecraft minifigures feature the same cubic design as the game, perfectly capturing the iconic blocky aesthetic while adding LEGO building possibilities. Battle the Ender Dragon, explore the Nether, or build your dream base with these detailed character figures. Perfect for Minecraft players who want to bring their digital adventures into physical building experiences, combining two beloved worlds of creativity and imagination.
Disney: Enter the magical world of Disney™ with LEGO® Disney minifigures! Collect beloved princesses like Elsa, Anna, Ariel, Belle, and Cinderella, along with classic characters like Mickey Mouse, Minnie Mouse, Donald Duck, and Goofy. Our Disney collection spans generations of storytelling, from timeless classics to modern favorites like Moana, Raya, and characters from Encanto. Build fairy tale castles with Frozen characters, sail the seas with Moana, or recreate magical moments with Disney Princesses. These minifigures capture the charm, magic, and wonder that Disney brings to audiences worldwide. Perfect for young builders and Disney fans who want to create their own happily ever afters.
Jurassic World: Life finds a way with LEGO® Jurassic World™ minifigures! Collect fearless dinosaur trainers like Owen Grady and Claire Dearing as they navigate the dangerous world of prehistoric creatures. From park scientists to InGen personnel, our Jurassic World collection features characters from all six films spanning the Jurassic Park and Jurassic World franchises. While the dinosaurs steal the show, these brave minifigures are ready to study, rescue, or escape from these magnificent creatures. Whether you're recreating the classic Jurassic Park gates or building modern Jurassic World adventures, these detailed minifigures bring 65 million years of history to life. Perfect for dinosaur enthusiasts and action-adventure fans of all ages.
Collectible Minifigures: Discover unique characters with LEGO® Collectible Minifigures! Since 2010, these mystery bag series have delivered quirky, creative, and surprising characters you won't find anywhere else. From astronauts and knights to hot dog vendors and unicorn guys, each series brings 12-16 unique minifigures with exclusive accessories and designs. Collect fan-favorite themes like Marvel, DC, Disney, The LEGO Movie, Harry Potter, and The Simpsons, or explore original characters that spark imagination. With over 30 series and 500+ unique figures released, the Collectible Minifigures line celebrates creativity, humor, and endless possibilities. Perfect for collectors hunting for rare figures or builders looking to add unique characters to their LEGO world.
Castle: Defend the kingdom with LEGO® Castle minifigures! From the classic Yellow Castle knights of 1978 to the elaborate factions of modern Castle themes, these medieval warriors have been battling for honor and glory for over four decades. Collect brave knights in shining armor, mysterious forestmen, fearsome Black Falcons, noble Lion Knights, and evil Dark Knights. Face off against skeleton armies, trolls, and dragons in epic medieval battles. Our Castle collection spans Black Knights, Crusaders, Royal Knights, Dragon Masters, and many more factions, each with unique colors, crests, and battle strategies. These timeless minifigures capture the adventure, chivalry, and fantasy that make medieval stories unforgettable.
Pirates: Set sail for adventure with LEGO® Pirates minifigures! From classic Pirates of 1989 to modern-day buccaneers, these swashbuckling characters have been hunting treasure and battling on the high seas for decades. Collect brave Imperial Guards defending their forts, cunning pirates with eye patches and peg legs, and island natives protecting their homes. Our Pirates collection features notorious captains, loyal crew members, mysterious mermaids, and fearsome skeletons. Whether you're defending treasure islands, engaging in naval battles, or searching for buried gold, these detailed minifigures bring the golden age of piracy to life. Perfect for adventurers who love tales of the seven seas and hidden treasure.
Space: Blast off to adventure with classic LEGO® Space minifigures! Since 1978, these pioneering astronauts have been exploring the cosmos, establishing bases on alien worlds, and encountering mysterious civilizations. Collect colorful space teams including Classic Space (white, red, yellow, blue), Blacktron, M-Tron, Space Police, Ice Planet 2002, Spyrius, and Insectoids. Each faction brings unique uniforms, vehicles, and missions to the final frontier. From peaceful explorers to space police chasing smugglers, these retro-futuristic minifigures capture the optimism and excitement of space exploration. Perfect for nostalgic builders and anyone who dreams of adventures among the stars with classic LEGO charm.
Technic: Experience engineering excellence with LEGO® Technic minifigures! While Technic sets focus on mechanical complexity and realistic functions, the minifigures represent skilled operators, pit crews, drivers, and technicians. These specialized figures often feature detailed racing suits, work uniforms, and professional gear. From Formula 1 drivers to construction equipment operators, Technic minifigures showcase the human element behind incredible machines. Though less common than traditional themes, these figures celebrate engineering, mechanics, and the people who operate complex machinery. Perfect for builders who appreciate technical excellence and want to add realistic scale and context to their Technic vehicle and machine collections.
The LEGO Movie: Everything is awesome with The LEGO® Movie™ minifigures! Join Emmet, Wyldstyle/Lucy, Batman, Unikitty, Benny, and MetalBeard as they fight to save the LEGO universe from Lord Business. Our LEGO Movie collection celebrates creativity, imagination, and the idea that anyone can be special. Collect heroes from Bricksburg, Cloud Cuckoo Land, and the Wild West, plus villains like Lord Business and his robot armies. These minifigures capture the humor, heart, and action of the hit animated films, from Master Builders to everyday citizens. Whether you're building to save the world or just having fun, these characters remind us that creativity has no limits.
Town: Experience everyday life with classic LEGO® Town minifigures! The predecessor to LEGO City, Town sets captured ordinary community life from 1978 through 2004. Collect police officers, firefighters, construction workers, doctors, shop owners, and regular citizens going about their daily lives. From gas station attendants to pizza delivery drivers, these minifigures represent the heart of any LEGO community. Town themes like Main Street, Paradisa, and Extreme Team showcase different eras of LEGO design philosophy. These nostalgic figures remind us that LEGO isn't just about fantasy - it's about celebrating the people and places that make communities thrive.
Creator: Unleash unlimited creativity with LEGO® Creator minifigures! This diverse theme encourages builders to create anything they can imagine, from buildings and vehicles to creatures and fantasy worlds. Creator minifigures reflect this versatility, including pilots, adventurers, surfers, race car drivers, and everyday people. With 3-in-1 sets offering multiple building options, these figures can be astronauts one moment and jungle explorers the next. The Creator line celebrates imagination without boundaries, giving builders the freedom to tell any story. Perfect for builders who love flexibility and want minifigures that fit any adventure they can dream up.
Dimensions: Break the boundaries between worlds with LEGO® Dimensions minifigures! This groundbreaking toys-to-life video game brought together characters from across pop culture universes. Collect Batman, Gandalf, Wyldstyle, Sonic the Hedgehog, Homer Simpson, Scooby-Doo, and dozens of other iconic characters - all meeting in one game. Each minifigure came with unique abilities and vehicles that transported between digital and physical play. While the game ended in 2017, these crossover minifigures remain beloved for bringing together franchises that would never normally meet. A unique moment in LEGO history where anything was possible and every character could be friends.
Monkie Kid: Discover ancient legends with LEGO® Monkie Kid™! Inspired by the classic Chinese tale Journey to the West, follow MK (Monkie Kid) as he discovers his destiny and battles the powerful Demon Bull King. Collect heroes like Mei, Pigsy, Mr. Tang, and Sandy, plus legendary figures like the Monkey King himself. Face off against villains like Macaque, Spider Queen, and the sinister Lady Bone Demon. This theme blends Chinese mythology with modern city life, creating a unique world of adventure. With detailed minifigures featuring beautiful printed designs and accessories inspired by traditional Chinese culture, Monkie Kid brings timeless legends to new generations.
Hidden Side: Hunt ghosts in LEGO® Hidden Side™! This innovative theme combines physical building with augmented reality ghost hunting through a mobile app. Collect paranormal investigators Jack Davids and Parker L. Jackson as they explore the haunted town of Newbury. Battle ghosts, possessed objects, and supernatural forces while uncovering the mystery behind the Hidden Side. Though the theme ended in 2020, these unique minifigures feature glow-in-the-dark elements and reversible heads showing ghostly possession. Hidden Side pushed LEGO into new territory, blending physical and digital play in exciting ways. Perfect for ghost hunters and anyone who loves mysteries with a supernatural twist.
